channel.title: No Escalation on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in No Escalation on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: LD-Javascript Code Detected in Requested URL
item.description: An external IP performed XSS reconnaissance against the /search/ endpoint, cycling through multiple injection payloads. All requests except the first returned HTTP 302, indicating server-side sanitization blocked execution. The attack did not succeed.

item.title: LD-LS Command Detected in Requested URL
item.description: Alert triggered on the string ’ls’ found in a legitimate search query parameter. The traffic originated from an internal IP to letsdefend.io and contains no malicious payload. False positive - rule lacks context awareness for partial string matches.

item.title: LD-Passwd Found in Requested URL - Possible LFI Attack
item.description: An external Tencent Cloud IP sent a single LFI request targeting /etc/passwd via path traversal. The server returned HTTP 500 with an empty response body, confirming the attack did not succeed.

item.title: LD-Possible SQL Injection Payload Detected
item.description: An external IP hosted on DigitalOcean performed a manual SQL injection reconnaissance against an internal web server, cycling through classic SQLi payloads. All requests returned HTTP 500, confirming the attack did not succeed.
